Members Platform
AI Training & Workshops

AI Won't Replace Your Team.
Leaders Who Understand AI Will.

The biggest barrier to AI adoption isn't technology. It's people. We build AI-confident teams.

Explore Members Platform Book Corporate Training
What's Included

Training That Actually Changes Behaviour

01

Executive AI Workshops

Half-day and full-day workshops for C-suite and senior leadership — covering AI strategy, decision-making, risk, and competitive positioning.

02

Team Upskilling Programs

Practical AI literacy programs for marketing, operations, sales, and finance teams — building capability to work with AI tools from day one.

03

Agentic AI Masterclasses

Deep-dive sessions on agentic AI systems — how they work, how to manage them, and how to evaluate vendors and use cases for your business.

04

Bespoke Corporate Programs

Fully tailored training programs built around your industry, culture, and strategic goals — delivered in-person or virtually, anywhere in the world.

Who We Train

👔

C-Suite & Board

CEOs, CDOs, CMOs, COOs who need strategic AI fluency to lead transformation from the top.

📊

Department Heads

Heads of Marketing, Ops, Finance, HR and Sales who need to apply AI within their function immediately.

⚡

Marketing & Ops Teams

Hands-on teams who will use AI tools daily and need practical skills, not just theory.

🏢

Entire Organisations

Companies undergoing AI transformation who need every employee to understand and embrace the change.

Delivery

How We Deliver

🌍

In-Person

UAE, London & Global. We travel to you for corporate programs — boardrooms, off-sites, team days.

💻

Virtual Live

Interactive live sessions via Zoom/Teams for distributed teams and global organisations.

📱

On-Demand

Access our full library of courses, workshops, and masterclasses any time via the Members Platform.

Members Platform

All Training Lives on the Members Platform

Access our full on-demand library, live monthly workshops, community, and exclusive content — all in one place.

Explore on the Members Platform →
Pricing

Members Platform Access

Monthly memberships. Cancel any time.

Starter
$250 / AED 920/mo

Members Platform access

  • ✓ Full on-demand training library
  • ✓ Monthly group Q&A session
  • ✓ Access to resource library
  • ✓ Cancel any time
Join Platform
MOST POPULAR
Growth
$650 / AED 2,390/mo

Members Platform access

  • ✓ Everything in Starter
  • ✓ Monthly live workshop session
  • ✓ Community access & networking
  • ✓ Priority Q&A access
  • ✓ New content first
Join Platform
Enterprise
Let's Talk

Bespoke corporate program

  • ✓ Fully bespoke corporate program
  • ✓ In-person delivery (UAE/Global)
  • ✓ Dedicated trainer
  • ✓ Custom content & assessments
  • ✓ All team member licences included
Let's Talk

✓ What's included

  • Full on-demand training library (Starter+)
  • Monthly group Q&A sessions
  • Live monthly workshop (Growth+)
  • Community & networking access (Growth+)
  • New content added monthly
  • Bespoke corporate delivery (Enterprise)

✗ What's not included

  • 1-on-1 personal coaching (can be quoted)
  • AI implementation or development work
  • In-person delivery (Starter & Growth)
  • Accredited certifications

Need in-person workshops? That's Enterprise — let's talk.

Let's build an AI-confident team.

Whether you need a one-off executive workshop or an organisation-wide transformation program — we'll design it around you.
